_note: Last Ferry — a survival courier. Push toward the dock (progress) against two obstacles: the cold (warmth->0 = freeze) and bandits (hp->0 = robbed). Every courier choice is a utility formula. RECKLESS couriers (low caution) push through the cold to save time and sometimes freeze; CAUTIOUS ones shelter and survive but risk missing the ferry. The HOST sets each courier's traits + the night's route.
